content.problemStatement:
You are shopping in a store that has nnn magical stones. For each stone, there is a probability ggg that you will put it in your bag. The value ggg is the same for all stones, all stones are independent, and you are given the value of ggg modulo 998 244 353998\ 244\ 353998 244 353.

Suppose when you checkout, you have rrr stones in your bag. Then you will be charged a price of (ar+b)k(ar+b)^k(ar+b)k magical coins, where a,b,ka, b, ka,b,k are constants. What is the expected value of the price you will pay, for all 1‚Č§k‚Č§kmax‚Ā°1\leq k\leq k_{\max}1‚Č§k‚Č§kmax‚Äč? Find the expected values modulo 998 244 353998\ 244\ 353998 244 353.

###Input


The first line contains five integers nnn, kmax‚Ā°k_{\max}kmax‚Äč, aaa, bbb, ggg
###Output


For all 1‚Č§k‚Č§kmax‚Ā°1\le k\le k_{\max}1‚Č§k‚Č§kmax‚Äč, print the expected value of the price modulo 998 244 353998\ 244\ 353998 244 353.
###Constraints


1‚Č§n‚Č§1091\leq n\leq 10^91‚Č§n‚Č§109
1‚Č§kmax‚Ā°‚Č§5‚čÖ1051\leq k_{\max}\leq 5\cdot10^51‚Č§kmax‚Äč‚Č§5‚čÖ105
1‚Č§a‚Č§998 244 3521\leq a\leq 998\ 244\ 3521‚Č§a‚Č§998 244 352
0‚Č§b‚Č§998 244 3520\leq b\leq 998\ 244\ 3520‚Č§b‚Č§998 244 352
1‚Č§g‚Č§998 244 3521\leq g\leq 998\ 244\ 3521‚Č§g‚Č§998 244 352
###Subtasks
**Subtask #1 (5 points):**


1‚Č§n‚Č§10001\leq n\leq 10001‚Č§n‚Č§1000
1‚Č§kmax‚Ā°‚Č§10001\leq k_{\max}\leq 10001‚Č§kmax‚Äč‚Č§1000
**Subtask #2 (20 points):**


1‚Č§n‚Č§1091\leq n\leq 10^91‚Č§n‚Č§109
1‚Č§kmax‚Ā°‚Č§1001\leq k_{\max}\leq 1001‚Č§kmax‚Äč‚Č§100
**Subtask #3 (50 points):**


1‚Č§n‚Č§1091\leq n\leq 10^91‚Č§n‚Č§109
1‚Č§kmax‚Ā°‚Č§5‚čÖ1041\leq k_{\max}\leq 5\cdot 10^41‚Č§kmax‚Äč‚Č§5‚čÖ104
